chunks.text: Our Staff - EECS at Berkeley Gina Garcia, Susanne Kauer, Antoine Davis, Josephine Williamson, and Glenna Anton at the 2022 EECS Student Awards reception (photo: Gina Garcia) Our Staff Our staff go above and beyond to support the students, enable the faculty, and keep the department running smoothly. Browse the Staff Directory Staff Contact Quick List Support group email addresses. Organizational Chart Who reports to whom: from Chairs to staff. Includes a link to the IRIS org chart. Our Leadership Industrial and Public Relations Staff Corporate Access Program (CAP), student recruitment and information sessions; Berkeley EECS Affiliates (BEECSA) program, BEARS conference, Joint Colloquium, and special events; technical reports, research summaries, grad student resume directory and other publications. Staff Awards Honors awarded to our staff. Student Affairs Staff Admissions; undergraduate and graduate programs; individual administrative assistance for all EE and CS students; reader/tutor assignments; Self-Paced Center. Course Support Staff EE and CS course materials/copying services, textbook adoption and instructional library; eGrade submission; class scheduling in Cory and Soda Halls. Faculty Support Staff Chair support; academic personnel (merits, promotions, leave, recruiting, faculty policies, benefits, etc.); faculty awards. Human Resources Staff Payroll and benefits. Computer and IT Support Staff Instructional and administrative computing, EECS Help Desk, computer accounts and user support; information management, administrative database support, web and event calendar support. Facilities and Engineering Services Staff Cory and Soda Hall keys, card keys, copy cards, mail delivery, room reservations, and building management (maintenance, space planning, safety); phone lines; engineering and infrastructure development and

EECS Help Desk, computer accounts and user support; information management, administrative database support, web and event calendar support. Facilities and Engineering Services Staff Cory and Soda Hall keys, card keys, copy cards, mail delivery, room reservations, and building management (maintenance, space planning, safety); phone lines; engineering and infrastructure development and support for Cory and Soda Hall instructional labs; online lecture capturing and AV support; parking arrangements. Accounting & Financial Services Staff Purchasing, reimbursements, fund balances, card management, recharge/billing. View Open Faculty Positions
